psalm-103-1.verse:
Bless the Lord, O my soul,
  And all that is within me, bless His holy name.
psalm-103-1.prayer: Lord, help my soul bless You with all that is within me. Let my whole life praise Your holy name.

psalm-103-2.verse:
Bless the Lord, O my soul,
  And forget none of His benefits;
psalm-103-2.prayer: Father, keep me from forgetting Your benefits. Help me remember Your goodness, mercy, and faithfulness each day.

psalm-103-3.verse:
Who pardons all your iniquities,
  Who heals all your diseases;
psalm-103-3.prayer: Lord, thank You for forgiving my sins and healing my brokenness. Draw me closer to Your restoring grace.

psalm-103-4.verse:
Who redeems your life from the pit,
  Who crowns you with lovingkindness and compassion;
psalm-103-4.prayer: Father, thank You for redeeming my life and crowning me with lovingkindness and compassion.

psalm-103-5.verse:
Who satisfies your years with good things,
  So that your youth is renewed like the eagle.
psalm-103-5.prayer: Lord, satisfy my life with good things and renew my strength according to Your mercy and care.

psalm-103-6.verse:
The Lord performs righteous deeds
  And judgments for all who are oppressed.
psalm-103-6.prayer: Father, thank You for working righteousness and justice for those who are oppressed. Help me trust Your defense and compassion.

psalm-103-7.verse:
He made known His ways to Moses,
  His acts to the sons of Israel.
psalm-103-7.prayer: Lord, thank You for making Your ways known. Teach me to follow Your truth with humility and obedience.

psalm-103-8.verse:
The Lord is compassionate and gracious,
  Slow to anger and abounding in lovingkindness.
psalm-103-8.prayer: Father, thank You for being compassionate, gracious, slow to anger, and abounding in lovingkindness.

psalm-103-9.verse:
He will not always strive with us,
  Nor will He keep His anger forever.
psalm-103-9.prayer: Lord, thank You that You do not remain angry forever. Help me receive Your mercy with gratitude and repentance.

psalm-103-10.verse:
He has not dealt with us according to our sins,
  Nor rewarded us according to our iniquities.
psalm-103-10.prayer: Father, thank You for not dealing with me according to my sins, but according to Your great mercy.

psalm-103-11.verse:
For as high as the heavens are above the earth,
  So great is His lovingkindness toward those who fear Him.
psalm-103-11.prayer: Lord, as high as the heavens are above the earth, so great is Your lovingkindness toward those who fear You.

psalm-103-12.verse:
As far as the east is from the west,
  So far has He removed our transgressions from us.
psalm-103-12.prayer: Father, thank You for removing my sins far from me. Help me walk in the freedom of Your forgiveness.

psalm-103-13.verse:
Just as a father has compassion on his children,
  So the Lord has compassion on those who fear Him.
psalm-103-13.prayer: Lord, thank You for showing compassion like a loving Father. Help me rest in Your tender care.

psalm-103-14.verse:
For He Himself knows our frame;
  He is mindful that we are but dust.
psalm-103-14.prayer: Father, You know my frame and remember that I am dust. Thank You for treating my weakness with mercy.

psalm-103-15.verse:
As for man, his days are like grass;
  As a flower of the field, so he flourishes.
psalm-103-15.prayer: Lord, remind me that my days are brief like grass. Help me live with wisdom, humility, and purpose.

psalm-103-16.verse:
When the wind has passed over it, it is no more,
  And its place acknowledges it no longer.
psalm-103-16.prayer: Father, earthly life fades quickly, but Your love remains. Help me place my hope in what is eternal.

psalm-103-17.verse:
But the lovingkindness of the Lord is from everlasting to everlasting on those who fear Him,
  And His righteousness to children’s children,
psalm-103-17.prayer: Lord, thank You that Your lovingkindness is everlasting toward those who fear You. Let Your righteousness bless future generations.

psalm-103-18.verse:
To those who keep His covenant
  And remember His precepts to do them.
psalm-103-18.prayer: Father, help me keep Your covenant and remember Your commandments with a faithful and obedient heart.

psalm-103-19.verse:
The Lord has established His throne in the heavens,
  And His sovereignty rules over all.
psalm-103-19.prayer: Lord, Your throne is established in the heavens and Your kingdom rules over all. Help me trust Your sovereign authority.

psalm-103-20.verse:
Bless the Lord, you His angels,
  Mighty in strength, who perform His word,
  Obeying the voice of His word!
psalm-103-20.prayer: Father, let my life join the angels in blessing You and obeying Your Word.

psalm-103-21.verse:
Bless the Lord, all you His hosts,
  You who serve Him, doing His will.
psalm-103-21.prayer: Lord, let all Your servants bless You. Teach me to serve You faithfully and joyfully.

psalm-103-22.prayer: Father, let all creation bless Your name. Help my soul continually praise You in every season.

psalm-103-closing.prayer:
Lord, thank You for Your mercy, forgiveness, compassion, and everlasting lovingkindness. Help me remember all Your benefits and bless Your holy name with my whole heart. Teach me to live with humility, gratitude, obedience, and trust in Your sovereign rule. May my life continually praise You, and may my soul never forget Your goodness.

In Jesus’ name, Amen.
